item.title: [已拥有] [搏击俱乐部] Fight Club 1999 2160p MA WEB-DL DTS-HD MA 5.1 DV HDR10+ H.265-TheFarm[搏击俱乐部 / 搏击会(港) / 斗阵俱乐部(台) / 格斗俱乐部 | 类型: 剧情 / 动作 / 悬疑 / 惊悚][28.83 GB]
item.description:

📄 原文内容:

引用
FARMHAND'S DIARY
From the hidden vaults of Moovies Anywhere came the sacred video master, borne across the digital realms by the ever-watchful HONE. Through fire, compression, and the merciless entropy of modern streaming infrastructure, the visual presentation endured unbroken, its clarity preserved like an ancient relic guarded beneath obsidian towers.

Likewise, the fabled RPU data was recovered from Moovies Anywhere through the tireless efforts of HONE, keeper of luminous me‍tadata and guardian of dynamic vision. Thus were the Dolby Vision pathways restored, allowing compatible displays to awaken their full chromatic power beneath the gaze of HDR's radiant dominion.

The HDR10+ me‍tadata was summoned from the distant archives of iT, entrusted to the fellowship by the revered CiNEPHiLES. Frame by frame, scene by scene, the luminance was shaped and guided with uncanny precision, as though forged anew beneath celestial furnaces where light itself is hammered into form.

From the mighty UHD Disc were drawn the sacred audio tracks, the English subtitles, and the long-spoken commentary of the ancients, all delivered through the noble hand of SURCODE. Untouched by lesser transcodes and spared the corruption of hollow streaming encoders, these elements stand in their highest known form, echoing with the fullness of their original mastering.

The chapter markers, properly named and meticulously arranged, were inscribed by the archivists of FraMeSToR, whose craft brings order to sprawling cinematic journeys. Through their labor, travelers may pass cleanly from one passage to the next, navigating the saga not as lost wanderers, but as those who possess the maps of old.

The English SRT subtitles were painstakingly OCR-forged from the original English PGS glyphs, transcribed rune by rune from image into text so they might travel freely across the many kingdoms of playback compatibility. A grueling task, no doubt undertaken while staring into subtitle bitmaps until the human soul began to separate from the body.

And from across the fractured streaming empires were gathered additional subtitles of many tongues and origins: AMZN, DSNP, HMAX, iT, MEGOGO, NF, Rakuten TV, and VIAP all yielded their fragments to the greater archive. For this monumental undertaking, deepest honors are bestowed upon Squash and SlipperyGnome, seekers of hidden tracks, hunters of forgotten captions, and custodians of the multilingual arts.

MA_DV vs MA_HDR vs UHD_REMUX
RPUs

HDR
https://comp.pics/compare/55e29279-7048-46ec-8e86-1edc920b3de8

GREETS
To all the shepherds, cowhands, and caretakers who've grazed alongside us!

Big Shout Out to our fellow herders, coop dwellers, and the whole barnyard crew.
There's no Farm without you

FARMER'S LOG
Please don't rustle our cattle and keep the NFO intact and the herd tagged correctly.
We are currently looking for : VHS suppliers





                       
◎译　　名　搏击俱乐部/搏击会(港)/斗阵俱乐部(台)/格斗俱乐部
◎片　　名　Fight Club
◎年　　代　1999
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情 / 动作 / 悬疑 / 惊悚
◎语　　言　英语
◎预算票房　$63,000,000 / $0
◎上映日期　1999-09-10(威尼斯电影节) / 1999-10-15(美国)
◎MPAA评级　R(美国) / 16(德国) / IIB(香港)
◎IMDb评分　8.8/10 from 2,463,790 users (No.13 Top250)
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0137523/
◎豆瓣评分　9.0/10 from 931,154 users (No.62 Top250)
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/1292000/
◎片　　长　139分钟
◎简　　介
　　杰克（爱德华•诺顿 饰）是一个大汽车公司的职员，患有严重的失眠症，对周围的一切充满危机和憎恨。

　　一个偶然的机会，杰克遇上了卖肥皂的商人泰勒（布拉德•皮特），一个浑身充满叛逆、残酷和暴烈的痞子英雄，并因为自己公寓失火而住进了泰勒破旧不堪的家中。两人因缘际会地成为了好朋友，并创立了“搏击俱乐部”：一个让人们不戴护具而徒手搏击，宗旨在于发泄情绪的地下组织。

　　俱乐部吸引了越来越多的人，逐渐发展成为一个全国性的地下组织，而泰勒也以自己个人的魅力，吸引着那些盲目的信徒。俱乐部的成员们到处滋事打架、大肆破坏，泰勒本人的行为也越来越疯狂。

　　杰克对于“搏击俱乐部”的现况及泰勒的行为越来越无法忍受，和泰勒发生争执，泰勒离开了他。然而，杰克发现，他走到何处都无法摆脱泰勒的影子，他开始思考：我到底是谁？

引用
